fields.title: Update memory operations to use id-based addressing
fields.description:
Change remove and update operations to use entry id instead of substring matching.

Acceptance criteria:
- Remove operation takes id parameter (not old_text substring)
- Update operation takes id + new content (not old_text substring)
- No ambiguous match errors needed anymore
- Return single MemoryEntry on success (not full snapshot)
fields.notes: Implemented id-based curated memory mutations: service update/remove now address entries by exact id, removed ambiguous substring matching, memory tool schema now uses id instead of old_text, and successful add/update/remove results now return the affected MemoryEntry instead of a full snapshot. Added service/runtime tests for id-based update/remove flows. Verification: npm run gate passes in extensions/tau/.
